write_probe.notes: OAuth includes write_themes and write_theme_code. Probe asset created, read back, and deleted successfully.

limitation_notes: Horizon is Online Store 2.0 with deep nested blocks; automated homepage JSON edits are fragile.
Prefer theme editor for section/block text, collection pickers, and images.
Asset API remains usable for soft-documentation and carefully scoped JSON updates with backup.
Rate limit ~2 calls/sec observed; client already sleeps 0.35s between calls.

homepage_targets.vat_note: Prices include UK VAT at 20% where applicable.
homepage_targets.poa_note: POA = Price on Application. Contact us for live trade pricing on selected lines.
homepage_targets.poa_contact_line: POA (Price on Application): call 07517 806082 or email icomplypropertyservices@gmail.com for live trade pricing.

manual_actions_required.action: In theme editor Home page → Hero → Heading block, set text to 'UK Trade Fire & Security Supply'
Add Collection list section; select Fire Alarm Control Panels, Smoke Detectors, Service Packages
Retarget Featured collection product-list from 'all' to priority collections (panels first; optional extra strips for smoke detectors and service packages)
Announcement bar + optional product Price 'Tax information' + footer line for VAT-inclusive messaging
Announcement bar second slide and/or homepage text strip explaining POA + contact
Upload images on the three featured collections so Collection list cards are not empty

notes: Homepage content left to merchant theme editor per OS 2.0 best practice; full click-path manual written.
Product bodies/tags may already carry POA HTML from pricing agents; theme should explain POA globally.
taxes_included is true — VAT note must say prices include VAT, not exclude.
